summary: Iteration 74: Bigship Courier API Integration - All features tested and working. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Bigship API integration is complete and working with real API calls
Warehouse dropdown loads 100 warehouses from Bigship API
B2C and B2B shipment types correctly implemented with different endpoints
E-way bill validation working for B2B shipments over Rs. 50,000
Auto-generated invoice PDF feature implemented when user doesn't upload invoice
Rate calculation returns multiple courier options with pricing
Manifest endpoint generates AWB and updates shipment status
Label download working - returns base64 PDF content
Shipment history with search and status filtering working
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: Multiple test shipments created during testing - visible in Shipment History
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 74 verified Bigship Courier API integration. All endpoints working: /api/courier/warehouses, /api/courier/calculate-rates, /api/courier/create-shipment, /api/courier/manifest, /api/courier/label/{id}, /api/courier/shipments. Shipment History shows 8 shipments with CREATED and MANIFESTED statuses. Manifested shipments have AWB numbers and Label download buttons. B2B e-way bill validation working for invoices > Rs. 50,000.

warehouse_dropdown.details: Loads 100 warehouses from Bigship API, default warehouse SUDARSHAN - Meerut (ID: 229862)

b2c_shipment_type.details: B2C - Single/Surface radio button works, standard courier delivery

b2b_shipment_type.details: B2B - Heavy Shipment radio button works, shows Company Name field

customer_details_form.details: First Name, Last Name, Phone, Alt Phone fields working
customer_details_form.validation: First name must be 3-25 characters (Bigship validation)

delivery_address_form.details: Address Line 1, Address Line 2, Landmark, Pincode fields working

package_details_form.details: Product Name, Category, HSN Code, Weight, L/W/H dimensions working

invoice_payment_form.details: Invoice Number, Invoice Amount, Payment Type (Prepaid/COD/ToPay), Invoice upload working

eway_bill_section.details: E-Way Bill section appears for B2B, marked Required when invoice > Rs. 50,000
eway_bill_section.validation: Error toast shown when trying to create B2B shipment > 50000 without e-way bill

rate_calculation.details: Calculate Rates button fetches courier options with pricing

shipment_creation.details: Create Shipment button creates order in Bigship, returns system_order_id

courier_selection.details: After shipment creation, courier options displayed for selection

manifest_awb_generation.details: Manifest button assigns courier and generates AWB number

label_download.details: Label button downloads shipping label PDF, success toast shown

shipment_history.details: Shipment History tab shows all shipments with Order ID, Customer, Destination, Product, AWB, Courier, Status

search_functionality.details: Search by name, phone, AWB working in Shipment History

status_badges.details: CREATED (yellow) and MANIFESTED (green) status badges displayed correctly

features_verified: Create Shipment and Shipment History tabs present
Step indicator: 1. Enter Details → 2. Select Courier → 3. Download Label
Pickup Location dropdown with warehouse details
Calculate Rates and Create Shipment buttons
Table with columns: Order ID, Customer, Destination, Product, AWB, Courier, Status, Actions
Search input with placeholder 'Search by name, phone, AWB...'
Label download button for manifested shipments

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/courier/warehouses: PASSED - Returns list of pickup warehouses
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/courier/calculate-rates: PASSED - Returns courier options with pricing
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/courier/manifest: PASSED - Assigns courier and generates AWB
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/courier/shipments: PASSED - Returns shipment history with search/filter
